model.description:
HikariCP is a high performance JDBC connection pool component. It is a high performance JDBC connection pool based on BoneCP with many improvements and optimization.

hikaricp_connections_timeout_total Connection timeout total count
hikaricp_connections_max Max connections
hikaricp_connections_min Min connections
model.title: HikariCP Connections

model.description: 非堆包含：Metaspace，Compressed Class Space，Code Cache
model.title: Non-Heap Memory

model.description: jvm内存使用量,实时使用情况
model.title: Heap Memory

model.description:
jvm 线程统计

jvm_threads_daemon_threads：当前JVM中守护线程（Daemon Threads）的数量。

jvm_threads_live_threads：当前JVM中活动线程（Live Threads）的数量。

jvm_threads_peak_threads：从JVM启动到当前时间，活动线程数量的峰值。
model.title: JVM thread

model.description:
allocated: Increase the size of the young generation memory pool after one GC and before the next GC,

promoted: From before GC to after GC, the count of the size of the old generation is increasing positively
model.title: GC Allocated/Promoted

model.description: 每次GC暂停所花费的时间
model.title: GC Pause Duration

targets.expr:
label_replace(
  max(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace",created_by_kind="ReplicaSet"}) by (created_by_name, uid, pod, pod_ip, node,host_ip),
  "replicaset",
  "$1",
  "created_by_name",
  "(.+)"
) * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{namespace="$namespace",owner_kind="Deployment",owner_name=~"$container"}) by (replicaset)

panels.description:
Aquire   Time:平均获取时间

Creation Time:平均创建时间

Usage    Time:平均使用时间
panels.title: Connections Time

panels.description:
active: the number of connections currently in use

idle: the number of current idle connections

pending: the number of threads waiting for a connection
panels.title: Connections Count

matcher.options: WSS$|RSS$|内存请求$|内存限制$|磁盘.*$

targets.expr:
sum(label_replace(
  max(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace",created_by_kind="ReplicaSet", pod_ip!=""}) by (created_by_name, uid, pod, pod_ip, node),
  "replicaset",
  "$1",
  "created_by_name",
  "(.+)"
) * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{namespace="$namespace",owner_kind="Deployment",owner_name=~"$container"}) by (replicaset)
* on(pod) group_right() sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu", namespace="$namespace"}) by (pod))

max(label_replace(
  max(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace",created_by_kind="ReplicaSet", pod_ip!=""}) by (created_by_name, uid, pod, pod_ip, node),

  "(.+)"
) * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{namespace="$namespace",owner_kind="Deployment",owner_name=~"$container"}) by (replicaset)
* on(pod) group_right() sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu", namespace="$namespace"}) by (pod))

max(label_replace(
  max(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace",created_by_kind="ReplicaSet", pod_ip!=""}) by (created_by_name, uid, pod, pod_ip, node),

panels.description:
WSS（Working Set Size）：WSS 是指在一定时间范围内实际被使用的内存大小。它表示当前进程实际正在使用的内存量，包括代码、数据以及被频繁访问的页面。WSS 可以帮助你了解应用程序实际需要的内存量，有助于调整资源分配以提高性能。

RSS（Resident Set Size）：RSS 是指进程当前驻留在物理内存中的内存量。它包括进程使用的所有内存，包括代码、数据、堆栈等，但不包括被交换到磁盘的部分。RSS 可以帮助你了解进程当前实际占用的物理内存量，有助于监控和优化内存使用。
panels.title: Memory Quota

panels.description:
WSS（Working Set Size）：WSS 是指在一定时间范围内实际被使用的内存大小。它表示当前进程实际正在使用的内存量，包括代码、数据以及被频繁访问的页面。WSS 可以帮助你了解应用程序实际需要的内存量，有助于调整资源分配以提高性能。

RSS（Resident Set Size）：RSS 是指进程当前驻留在物理内存中的内存量。它包括进程使用的所有内存，包括代码、数据、堆栈等，但不包括被交换到磁盘的部分。RSS 可以帮助你了解进程当前实际占用的物理内存量，有助于监控和优化内存使用。
panels.title: Pod Memory Info-[$pod]

targets.expr: sum by(container,pod) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{pod=~"$pod", area="heap"}) / sum by(container,pod) (jvm_memory_committed_bytes{pod=~"$pod", area="heap"})

panels.description:
pool_size：当前线程数

pool_max：最大线程数

active：活动线程数

queued：排队任务数

pool_core：核心线程数

completed_tasks：已完成任务数
panels.title: Thread pool:[$pod]

panels.description:
QPS（每秒请求数）是指单位时间内的请求次数，是一个衡量系统吞吐量的重要指标。
应用服务的请求QPS指的是在单位时间内，应用服务处理的请求数量。
panels.title: HTTP Req/s

targets.expr:
sum(label_replace(
  max(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace",created_by_kind="ReplicaSet", pod_ip!=""}) by (created_by_name, uid, pod, pod_ip, node),
  "replicaset",
  "$1",
  "created_by_name",
  "(.+)"
) * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{namespace="$namespace",owner_kind="Deployment",owner_name=~"$container"}) by (replicaset)
* on(pod) group_right() sum(container_sockets{namespace="$namespace",container!=""}) by (pod))

panels.description: The number of network errors including receiving and transmitting.

targets.expr:
sum(label_replace(
  max(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace",created_by_kind="ReplicaSet", pod_ip!=""}) by (created_by_name, uid, pod, pod_ip, node),
  "replicaset",
  "$1",
  "created_by_name",
  "(.+)"
) * on(replicaset) group_left() max(kube_replicaset_owner{namespace="$namespace",owner_kind="Deployment",owner_name=~"$container"}) by (replicaset)
* on(pod) group_right() (sum(container_network_receive_errors_total{namespace="$namespace"}) by (pod) + sum(container_network_transmit_errors_total{namespace="$namespace"}) by (pod)))

panels.title: Network Errors
